response.justification: Bogdan has roughly 17 years of broad software engineering experience, which clears the minimum bar, and his current role touches AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks. However, the role demands director-level strategic advisory capability and recognized AI expertise with demonstrated AI-powered products at scale — neither of which the resume establishes. AI appears only as a recent and lightly described addition to an otherwise traditional full-stack career, and there is no evidence of customer-facing strategic advisory work, cloud platform leadership, or an advanced AI-related degree.
strengths: Meets the 15-year experience floor with a legitimately broad stack spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial background (GISCollective founder, several open-source platforms) shows independent builder instinct
Current work on MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks is directionally relevant to the role's AI focus
concerns: AI expertise is thin and recent — no demonstrated AI products or platforms at scale, no publications or recognized contributions in the field
No Master's or PhD in an AI-related field, which is a strongly preferred differentiator for this level
Current seniority (Staff Software Engineer) and career arc show no evidence of strategic customer advisory, executive partnership, or director-level scope

key_factors.factor: Broad engineering depth meets experience floor
